Package lu.kbra.pclib.pointer

Class JavaPointer<T>

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.pointer.JavaPointer<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Consumer<T>, Supplier<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ObjectPointer, PrimitivePointer, WeakObjectPointer
public abstract class JavaPointer<T> extends Object implements Consumer<T>, Supplier<T>
